name: Compliance & Risk Management Suite
description: Software that helps regulated companies (healthcare, finance) stay audit-ready and reduce compliance risk.

seniority_angles.director: Frame around execution speed and hitting the audit deadline without slipping the timeline.
seniority_angles.vp: Frame around vendor consolidation, reducing risk exposure across teams, and budget optics with leadership.
seniority_angles.c_suite: Frame around board liability, regulatory penalties avoided, and compliance readiness as a strategic asset.

name: Workforce Management Platform
description: HR/workforce software for scaling companies managing rapid headcount growth or restructuring.

seniority_angles.director: Frame around not looking bad to leadership when onboarding/scaling timelines slip.
seniority_angles.vp: Frame around strategic workforce risk and consolidating point solutions into one platform.
seniority_angles.c_suite: Frame around cost savings at scale and board-level workforce planning visibility.

name: Data Infrastructure & Analytics Platform
description: Infrastructure for companies investing heavily in data/AI capabilities after funding or expansion news.

seniority_angles.director: Frame around shipping the new infrastructure on time without team burnout.
seniority_angles.vp: Frame around build-vs-buy risk and consolidating vendor sprawl.
seniority_angles.c_suite: Frame around cost efficiency of infrastructure spend relative to the new funding/expansion.
